scope_of_work:
Phase 1: Discovery & Planning
Conduct stakeholder interviews, define requirements, and deliver a project roadmap.

Phase 2: Design
Create wireframes and high-fidelity mockups for all core pages.

Phase 3: Development
Build responsive front-end components and integrate with existing back-end APIs.

Phase 4: Testing & Launch
Perform QA across devices, address feedback, and deploy to production.
